action_set_definitions.name: get_intersections_list
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of all intersection identifiers within the managed urban traffic network.

action_set_definitions.name: get_traffic_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Queries real-time traffic statistics for a specific intersection, including lane-specific queue counts.

intersection_id.description: The unique identifier for the intersection.

action_set_definitions.name: update_mmu_config
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the hardware Malfunction Management Unit (MMU) in the traffic cabinet to recognize and validate a new phase sequence, preventing emergency flash failures.

intersection_id.description: The identifier of the target intersection.

phase_sequence_mode.description: The logic model to be programmed into the MMU (e.g., 'Fully Protected Temporal Separation').

action_set_definitions.name: set_timing_parameters
action_set_definitions.description: Programs specific phase timing intervals including yellow change and all-red clearance, and sets the operational model.

intersection_id.description: The identifier of the target intersection.

yellow_change_interval.description: The duration of the yellow light in seconds.

all_red_clearance.description: The duration of the all-red clearance in seconds.

model_name.description: The name of the control model to apply.

action_set_definitions.name: activate_signal_reconfiguration
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the deployment and activation of the newly programmed signal settings and phase model at the intersection.

intersection_id.description: The identifier of the intersection to activate.

state_description.intersections: List of all intersections under management.
state_description.simulation_time: Total elapsed simulation time in seconds.
state_description.traffic_density_multiplier: A factor representing the global traffic demand (e.g., 1.0 for normal, 2.0 for rush hour).
